name: Conical Tank Related Rates
description: Related rates problems involving conical tanks filling or emptying
canonical_form_latex: \frac{dV}{dt} = \frac{1}{3}\pi r^2 \frac{dh}{dt} + \frac{2}{3}\pi rh \frac{dr}{dt} \text{ or use similar triangles}
identification_signal: Cone, funnel, conical tank, sand pouring

strategy.step_1: Draw cone diagram, label r, h, V
strategy.step_2: Use similar triangles to relate r and h
strategy.step_3: Write V in terms of single variable (usually h)

front.text: Water pours into conical tank at 5 m³/min. How fast is level rising when h=3?

back.title: Cone related rates
back.explanation: Use similar triangles: r/h = R/H (constant ratio)

steps.title: Similar triangles
steps.instruction: Relate r and h using cone dimensions

steps.title: Volume formula
steps.instruction: V = (1/3)πr²h, substitute r in terms of h
steps.why: Get V as function of single variable

problem_cards.task: Cone with height 10m, radius 4m at top. dV/dt = 5. Find dh/dt when h=5.
